entries.title: All-in-one updater
changes: Added a dedicated self-update path for the all-in-one build so it downloads only the single bundled artifact.
Embedded the all-in-one version during build and added artifact metadata to the manifest.
Kept the generated all-in-one independent from split module files on disk.
Fixed colorskin persistence edge cases and added local player glow under Render - World.

entries.title: Module split cleanup
changes: Converted Colorskins and Dormant from bundle-loaded scripts into regular Pasthetic modules.
Removed the old bundle loader, bundle patches, and bundled script files from the runtime tree.
Split AI Peek into helpers, record analysis, position building, and scanner modules while keeping the main file as the state machine.
Reviewed the remaining large files and left tightly coupled UI/Panorama/runtime files intact where splitting would add noise without a clean boundary.

entries.title: Repository layout cleanup
changes: Moved split modules and hosted assets under the pasthetic/ repository folder.
Added the loader and all-in-one script to the repository root.
Updated the loader updater to use manifest paths relative to the game root.
Added a GitHub redownload hint for missing modules and update/download failures.

entries.title: AI peek and movement controls
changes: Added AI Peek as a Pasthetic module with minimum damage key handling and bad-record scan filtering.
Added Air stop on Shift under Miscellaneous for jump velocity braking.
Added Hotkey activation to Defensive triggers.
Renamed Auto whitelist broken LC to Bad record handler and tightened record/backtrack disruptor behavior.
Improved Panorama popup handling and server browser old-version cleanup.
Reworked viewmodel editing around draggable normal/scoped profiles.

entries.title: Record-based defensive actions
changes: Replaced Auto whitelist broken LC core with enemy record-history detection based on simulation-time stall, rollback, release, and the server 64u teleport rule.
Changed Backtrack poison from always-on random pulses into release-triggered pulses plus light defensive pulses only while local is hittable and cannot fire.
Added a bottom-center Defensive: True / False indicator for defensive state visibility.
Added Defensive action multiselect for broken LC handling: Force body, Whitelist, or both.
Default handling now forces body aim on dangerous defensive/release records instead of only refusing to shoot them.
Whitelist/force-body overrides are restored when targets are no longer valid or the feature is disabled.
Added yaw-history scanning to Record disruptor so it avoids recently used dangerous yaw records instead of applying a blind offset.
Rebuilt the local all-in-one script with the updated modules.

entries.title: Record disruptor and antibrute delta
changes: Added Record disruptor as a removable anti-aim module that perturbs regular yaw records without forcing defensive anti-aim.
Changed yaw and jitter random sliders into Antibrute delta controls that react only to dangerous bullet impacts.
Scaled Record disruptor strength by local velocity and limited it to double tap / hideshots instead of normal fake lag.
Hardened the Panorama server browser cleanup and restored News replacement behavior with safer panel guards.

entries.title: Defensive trigger cycle
changes: Replaced Defensive anti-aim Trigger tick delay and Activation window with Trigger from, Trigger to, and Trigger duration cycle controls.
Removed the old defensive Delay from, Delay to, and Delay chaos logic so defensive AA is driven by the new trigger cycle only.
Updated broken LC auto whitelist and Predicted at targets logic to use prediction-driven threat handling.
Kept Panorama/server browser cleanup fixes for server state, background/logo refresh, and removed voice/audio remnants.

entries.title: Server browser background transparency
changes: Server Browser now removes its dark panel background while Change background is enabled and keeps it when the default Panorama background is used.

entries.title: Manifest cleanup
changes: Fixed the runtime_modules manifest checksum so the updater no longer reports a false pending file.

entries.title: Server browser final fit
changes: Adjusted the Server Browser panel to the final Panorama background area.
Restored Panorama-side IP copying and made single-click copy immediate while keeping double-click connect.

entries.title: Server browser panel width
changes: Moved the Server Browser right edge 70px left to better fit the Panorama background area.

entries.title: Panorama background vertical extension
changes: Extended the Panorama background another 50px upward while keeping the lower edge fixed.

entries.title: Panorama background left extension tweak
changes: Extended the Panorama background another 20px to the left while keeping the right edge fixed.

entries.title: Panorama background left shift
changes: Extended the Panorama background another 50px to the left while keeping the right edge fixed.

entries.title: Panorama background left extension
changes: Extended the Panorama background 60px to the left while keeping the right edge fixed.

entries.title: Panorama background horizontal fit
changes: Adjusted the Panorama background horizontal expansion to 15px left and 40px right.

entries.title: Panorama background stretch
changes: Expanded the Panorama background layer by 100px horizontally with a 2:1 left/right bias.
Expanded the Panorama background layer by 100px vertically while keeping the image centered around the model.

entries.title: Panorama background replacement
changes: Replaced the Panorama background asset with 1.jpg.
Reset background framing to centered cover without horizontal compression or offsets.

entries.title: Panorama background position
changes: Moved the Panorama background 50px further left.
Extended the background layer upward while keeping its bottom edge anchored.

entries.title: Panorama background framing
changes: Changed the Panorama background renderer to use a dedicated layer.
Compressed the background horizontally by 10 percent and shifted it 100px left without modifying the image asset.

entries.title: Panorama background
changes: Added the new Panorama background asset hosted from the Pasthetic repository.
Changed the Panorama background option to load the hosted 123.jpg background.
Kept the server browser layout cleanup with left-aligned IP text and no scrollbar.

entries.title: Server browser layering
changes: Server Browser now replaces the News content inside the native News container for proper panel layering.
Disabled Server Browser hit-testing while it is covered by upper Panorama panels.

entries.title: Server browser menu guard
changes: Server Browser now automatically hides outside of the main menu.

entries.title: Larger Panorama logo
changes: Increased the custom CS:GO navbar logo size.

entries.title: Quiet server browser
changes: Disabled server browser debug logging in the console.

entries.title: Smaller Panorama logo
changes: Reduced the custom CS:GO navbar logo size again.

entries.title: Panorama logo alignment
changes: Centered the custom CS:GO logo inside the navbar button slot.

entries.title: Panorama logo sizing
changes: Reduced the custom CS:GO logo size in the Panorama navbar.

entries.title: Panorama logo states
changes: CS:GO Logo now uses Pasthetic hosted logo assets from GitHub.
The logo switches to the outdated-version variant when the updater finds pending files.

entries.title: Server browser toggle
changes: Added Server Browser to Render - Panorama cleanup options.
Server Browser now replaces the News panel by automatically applying the news/shop hide behavior while enabled.

entries.title: Panorama menu tab
changes: Added Render - Panorama menu tab for main menu cleanup options.
Connected the existing Panorama cleanup module to the new menu controls.

entries.title: Main menu server browser
changes: Added the Panorama main menu server browser as a Pasthetic runtime module.
Server browser now keeps its last A2S results in an embedded script cache and sorts visible servers by player count.

entries.title: Shared logo removal
changes: Removed shared logo runtime integration and assets from Pasthetic.
Updated the manifest after removing the voice-message based shared logo experiment.

entries.title: Predicted at targets
changes: Added adaptive Predicted at targets for anti-aim base correction against broken LC and shift release movement.
Moved prediction logic into a standalone antiaim_predicted_at_targets module with a single menu checkbox.

entries.title: World cleanup tools
changes: Added Remove ragdolls in Render - World using direct ragdoll entity hiding instead of physics cvars.
Added a standalone Panorama draft module for later main menu cleanup work.

entries.title: Clantag animations
changes: Added a single unique Pasthetic clantag that mixes Monolith framing with Cipher-style character glitches.
Clantag animation now uses synced game tick time so multiple players with the tag enabled stay on the same frame.

entries.title: Dormant aimbot validation
changes: Hardened dormant origin validation against near-zero and out-of-map coordinates.
Dormant ESP positions now require a valid box, sane alpha, proximity to the last real position, and one stable confirmation tick before shooting.

entries.title: Broken LC whitelist damage gate
changes: Auto whitelist broken LC now checks the active Rage minimum damage before preserving targets.
Minimum damage override is respected when its hotkey is active.

entries.title: Updater diagnostics
changes: Fixed update manifest parsing in GameSense by using json.parse.
Switched update URLs to uncached refs/heads/main raw GitHub paths.
Added clearer updater error messages with response previews.

entries.title: Manual updater
changes: Added manual Check updates and Download update buttons.
Added manifest-based file comparison by size and checksum.
Removed automatic module download from script startup.

entries.title: Pasthetic modularization
changes: Moved Pasthetic runtime code into lua/pasthetic modules.
Added module diagnostics logging for startup health checks.
Kept aes.lua as the main GameSense entrypoint.
